emotional_tone: Aggressive clarity, elite athleticism, professional, high-stakes
design_philosophy: UFC graphic style feel: stark contrasts, heavy/condensed typography, metallic accents, and dense data presentation mimicking the 'Tale of the Tape'.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl uppercase tracking-normal leading-none font-heading

layout_modes.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 auto-rows-min

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border-2 border-zinc-950 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:-translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)]

components.button_primary: bg-zinc-950 text-white font-heading uppercase text-xl px-6 py-3 border-2 border-transparent hover:bg-transparent hover:text-zinc-950 hover:border-zinc-950 transition-all duration-150 ease-out
components.button_accent: bg-[#DC2626] text-white font-heading uppercase text-xl px-6 py-3 border-2 border-[#DC2626] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:-translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)] transition-all
components.button_gold: bg-[#D4AF37] text-zinc-950 font-heading uppercase text-xl px-6 py-3 border-2 border-zinc-950 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)] transition-all
components.input: bg-zinc-50 border-2 border-zinc-950 px-4 py-3 font-body focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#DC2626] transition-colors rounded-none
components.table_header: bg-zinc-950 text-white font-heading uppercase text-lg tracking-wider
components.badge_weightclass: bg-zinc-200 text-zinc-950 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-1 uppercase font-bold
components.badge_status: border-2 border-zinc-950 font-heading uppercase text-sm px-2 py-0.5

icons_library.name: @phosphor-icons/react
icons_library.instructions: Use 'bold' weight for active state or important actions, 'regular' for standard.

animations.page_load: framer-motion opacity-0 y-4 to opacity-100 y-0 with spring physics
animations.banned: Slow fades, gentle floating (breaks the aggressive combat feel)

auth_hero.description: Shirtless MMA fighter in the dark, extremely high contrast, dramatic lighting. Use as the left/right split background on the login/signup screen with a black/white gradient overlay.

fighter_portraits.description: Fighter standing in ring with hands on hips.

specific_views.dashboard_overview: Top stats (Total Revenue, Active Fighters, Upcoming Events) using heavy typography. Use 'cards' surface strategy with brutalist shadows.
specific_views.event_management: List of events styled like 'Tale of the Tape' rows. High contrast dates (e.g., 'OCT 24').
specific_views.fight_card_builder: Two-column bento box layout for matchups. 'Fighter A vs Fighter B' with intersecting bold typography and 'VS' in Accent Red.
specific_views.ai_promo_generator: Text area with a prominent Gold Action Button. The result block should look like a printed ticket or fight poster snippet.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: APCA standard required. Black text on white, White text on black. Avoid mid-tones for typography.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-event-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Use 'neo-brutalist' / 'Swiss brutalist' styling. No soft border-radius. Everything is sharp, squared off, high contrast.
2. Fonts MUST be loaded in the main index.html/css. Use Bebas Neue for all H1/H2/H3 and buttons.
3. Buttons should have solid black borders and a hard shadow that shifts on hover, simulating a physical mechanical press.
5. For the AI Matchup Suggestions, heavily feature the 'accent_gold' color to indicate 'premium/AI' capabilities.
6. Do NOT use standard Vercel/Shadcn rounded aesthetic. Customize the Shadcn variables to: radius: 0, heavy borders.
7. Implement light theme as default, but use dark theme for specific high-intensity components like 'Fight Card Builder' modal or header to give the 'UFC event' night feel.
8. Use the provided Unsplash URLs for the Auth split screen background and Fighter Roster dummy data.
